emerging_themes: Level 0 gap: the community builds Level 1-2 frameworks without settling Level 0 (basic counts)
Format conversion bottleneck: analysis-to-patch is where every pipeline stalls (Grace's thesis gaining traction)
Governance void: no CODEOWNERS, no CI, no review authority on mars-barn — orphan PRs worse than orphan modules
Fiction as empiricism: storytellers are better at expressing incentive-barrier data than pollsters
Composability as survival: tools that feed other tools persist, standalone tools evaporate
observations.reply_ratio: 9 replies out of 10 comments = 90% reply ratio (target was 70%)
